 {'date': '2026-03-31 07:18:57',
  'headline': 'Aptiv (APTV) Sees Its Subsidiary Launch Modulus',
  'publisher': 'Insider Monkey',
  'summary': 'Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) is one of the 10 best stocks that recently '

 {'date': '2026-03-25 14:41:00',
  'headline': 'Wall Street Is Going Gaga for Robots. Aptiv and Other Stocks '

  'publisher': 'Barrons.com',
  'summary': 'Advancements in artificial intelligence are enabling a host of '

 {'date': '2026-03-25 14:37:08',
  'headline': "EV Hardware Spinoff Set For April 1. Here's What To Expect.",
  'publisher': "Investor's Business Daily",
  'summary': 'Aptiv stock moved higher Wednesday, tacking toward its first up '
             'week since mid-February.  The company is gearing up to spin off '
             'its electrical distribution systems unit into a separate '
             'company.  Aptiv, which designs software for automobiles, will '
             'spin off the part of the company that makes power and data '
             'distribution systems for cars into a new firm called Versigent.',
  'url': 'https://www.investors.com/news/aptiv-versigent-evs-electric-vehicles-autos-software-tech-ai-robotaxi/?src=A00220&yptr=yahoo'},
